title: Rich Tofu Thai Stir-fry
description: A rich and silky Thai dish featuring a creamy sauce made with tofu as the main ingredient, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat.
Add bell peppers and snow peas, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until slightly softened.
Crush the tofu in a colander to remove excess liquid, then add it to the pan with chili garlic sauce, fish sauce, soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Stir well to combine.
Gradually pour in water while stirring continuously to create a creamy sauce. Let simmer for about 5 minutes until thickened slightly.
Stir in chopped cilantro if using. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the rich Tofu Thai Stir-fry over cooked rice or noodles.
